article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary bars and nightclubs can now sell bottle service — no application needed
briefs.summary: BC has updated its liquor rules to allow Liquor Primary establishments (bars, nightclubs, and similar venues) to sell bottle service — a full bottle of spirits served at a reserved table, typically as a premium experience. This change takes effect automatically for all Liquor Primary licensees with no application required.
briefs.action_required: Review and follow the new bottle service rules: serving size limits, last-hour sales ban, and storage requirements.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
